meta.methodology: Start from Jupiter's full Solana token cache, keep tokens that remain routeable, verified, recent, or visibly active on Jupiter surfaces, add assets supported by tracked protocols including Loopscale and Omnipair, then drop dead or inactive tokens using liquidity, holder, market-cap, and trading-activity thresholds. Surviving assets are enriched with Jupiter spot prices and Helius token imagery when configured.
